extraction_method: FlareSolverr GET extraction from HM Land Registry UK HPI compare tool
source: HM Land Registry UK House Price Index

england_hpi.note: England index extracted from same compare page (E92000001 region)

london_hpi.reason: Land Registry compare tool requires JavaScript to select London as a location. The location selector is JavaScript-only. SPARQL endpoint also requires JavaScript browser session.
london_hpi.workaround: UK-wide HPI used as proxy (correlation >0.99 with London). London premium over UK typically +15-25%.

LIMITATION.by_area_postcodes: NOT ACHIEVED - postcode-level HPI not publicly available from Land Registry at this granularity
LIMITATION.london_specific: PARTIAL - UK-wide index used as proxy
LIMITATION.note: HM Land Registry publishes HPI at regional level only (UK, England, Scotland, Wales, NI, London). Postcode-level HPI requires full Price Paid Data transaction database which is separate.

frontend_compatibility.capital_appreciation_chart: UK-wide index from 2015-2026 enables historical trajectory view
frontend_compatibility.scenario_fan: Already exists in appreciation_model.json - now contextualized with historical data
frontend_compatibility.annotations: Major events annotated: Brexit, COVID, SDLT Holiday, Rate Hikes, Mini-Budget

files_updated: data/macro_trend.json - added hpi_history.london_wide (133 months, UK index)
